name: kozydozy-platform
description: Shared design-system packages for the Kozy Dozy app portfolio (Phase 1: tokens, theme, ui).

scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @kozydozy/tokens typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/theme typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/ui typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/forms typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/shared typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/foundation typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/routing typecheck && yarn workspace @kozydozy/layout typecheck
